article_meta.title: Democracy Dies in DarknessBusinessFuture of WorkEconomyEconomic PolicyMediaPersonal FinanceTechnologyBusiness of Climate

reasoning: The summary stays neutral, avoids loaded language from the source, attributes contested points, and refrains from adopting the article’s framing. Minor omission: it excludes Trump/inner circle’s perspective noted in the article.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs and descriptors; no charged phrasing adopted from the article.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All contentious statements are attributed (e.g., prosecutors allege, mother told police).
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: Mostly factual; slight subjectivity in 'appearing completely ordinary,' but grounded in article context.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: Calm tone; no dramatization beyond facts.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks by the model.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No un-attributed claims about motives; acknowledges uncertainty.
custom_reasoning.slant: Slight slant by omitting Trump/inner circle’s claim of radicalization present in the article.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Does not include the Trump/inner circle perspective, which appears in the source.
custom_reasoning.word_choice: Politically neutral terms; 'right-wing activist' mirrors the article’s descriptor without added charge.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Balances procedural facts with uncertainty; no undue emphasis on negative angles.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Gives space to multiple source types without privileging one.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source; avoids adopting rhetorical framing.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Includes friends, prosecutors, family, and authorities but omits Trump/inner circle noted in the article.
